summary.zh-CN: 提取网页里的图片、视频、文档和链接
summary.en: Extract images, media, documents, and links from web pages

description.zh-CN: 输入网址，解析页面里的图片、视频、音频、PDF、文档、链接等资源并可下载。通过 Desktop bridge fetch 绕过浏览器 CORS 限制。
description.en: Enter a URL to parse downloadable page resources such as images, video, audio, PDFs, documents, and links via the Desktop bridge fetch path.
